description: Integrate claude-super-setup with LobeHub ecosystem — MCP registry client, agent/skill import, knowledge RAG, and community contributions

tasks.title: Create MCP registry cache schema and fetch script
tasks.description: Build scripts/mcp-registry-fetch.py that fetches MCP server listings from LobeHub, Official MCP Registry, and Smithery. Normalizes to common MCPServerEntry format. Creates schemas/mcp-registry-cache.schema.json. Stores cache at ~/.claude/mcp-registry/cache.json with 24h TTL.
acceptance: scripts/mcp-registry-fetch.py fetches from at least 2 registries (LobeHub + Official)
Cache file created at ~/.claude/mcp-registry/cache.json with valid schema
schemas/mcp-registry-cache.schema.json validates the cache structure
Graceful per-registry failure (one registry down doesn't block others)
Cache includes server name, description, transport, install config, and registry source

tasks.title: Create /mcp-search command
tasks.description: Build commands/mcp-search.md that searches the MCP registry cache by query string. Searches across name, description, tags, and categories. Displays results in a formatted table with name, registry, transport, stars, and install status.
acceptance: commands/mcp-search.md exists and is a valid slash command
Searches cached MCP servers by name, description, tags
Displays results in formatted table with source registry
Shows install status (installed/available) by checking settings.json
Auto-refreshes cache if stale (>24h) or missing

tasks.title: Create /mcp-install and /mcp-remove commands
tasks.description: Build commands/mcp-install.md that installs an MCP server by adding it to settings.json with correct transport config. Prompts for required env vars. Build commands/mcp-remove.md that removes an MCP server entry. Build commands/mcp-list.md that shows installed servers.
acceptance: commands/mcp-install.md resolves server from cache and adds to settings.json
Prompts user for required environment variables before install
commands/mcp-remove.md removes server entry from settings.json
commands/mcp-list.md shows all installed MCP servers with source
Install does not overwrite existing settings.json entries (merge only)

tasks.title: Update agent catalog schema to v2
tasks.description: Update schemas/catalog.schema.json to v2 with new marketplace fields (source_repo, lobehub_id, version, author, tags, downloads, rating, install_method). Backward compatible — all new fields optional. Migrate agents/catalog.json to v2 format.
acceptance: schemas/catalog.schema.json updated with v2 fields (all optional for backward compat)
agents/catalog.json version bumped to 2.0.0 with marketplace metadata section
Existing agent entries unchanged (pure additive migration)
New fields: source_repo, lobehub_id, version, author, tags, install_method

tasks.title: Build agent format converter (LobeHub JSON -> our MD)
tasks.description: Create scripts/agent-converter.py that converts LobeHub JSON agent format to our Markdown agent format. Maps systemRole to body content, meta fields to YAML frontmatter, plugins to tools list. Import direction only.
acceptance: scripts/agent-converter.py converts LobeHub JSON to our Markdown format
Correctly maps: systemRole -> body, meta.title -> name, meta.tags -> tags, config.model -> model_tier
Output validates against schemas/agent-frontmatter.schema.json
Handles edge cases: missing fields, empty systemRole, special characters

tasks.title: Create /agent-search and /agent-import commands
tasks.description: Build commands/agent-search.md to search local catalog + LobeHub agents. Build commands/agent-import.md to import a LobeHub agent into local Markdown format using the converter.
acceptance: commands/agent-search.md searches local catalog and LobeHub agent index
commands/agent-import.md downloads LobeHub agent and converts to local MD format
Imported agents saved to agents/community/imported/ directory
Imported agents added to catalog.json with source='imported' and lobehub_id set

tasks.title: Create skill registry and /skill-search command
tasks.description: Create schemas/skill-registry.schema.json and ~/.claude/skill-registry.json to track installed skills with source metadata. Build commands/skill-search.md to search local + LobeHub skills.
acceptance: schemas/skill-registry.schema.json defines skill tracking format
commands/skill-search.md searches local skills and LobeHub marketplace
Results show: name, description, source (local/lobehub), installed status
Local skills auto-discovered from ~/.claude/skills/

tasks.title: Create /skill-import command
tasks.description: Build commands/skill-import.md that imports a skill from LobeHub or GitHub. Downloads SKILL.md + bundled resources. Installs to ~/.claude/skills/imported/<name>/. Updates skill registry.
acceptance: commands/skill-import.md accepts LobeHub skill ID or GitHub URL
Downloads SKILL.md and bundled resources to ~/.claude/skills/imported/<name>/
Updates ~/.claude/skill-registry.json with new entry
Imported skills have correct SKILL.md frontmatter and are usable by Claude Code

tasks.title: Build Knowledge RAG MCP server — core ingestion
tasks.description: Create mcp-servers/knowledge-rag-server.py with knowledge_ingest and knowledge_status MCP tools. Uses SQLite + FTS5 for text indexing. Chunks markdown and source code files. Implements hash-based change detection.
acceptance: mcp-servers/knowledge-rag-server.py implements knowledge_ingest MCP tool
SQLite database created per-project at ~/.claude/knowledge/{project-hash}.db
Documents table and chunks table created with FTS5 index
Markdown files chunked by headings then paragraphs (max 512 tokens)
Source code files chunked by function/class boundaries
Hash-based change detection skips unchanged files
knowledge_status tool returns DB stats (doc count, chunk count, size)

tasks.title: Add semantic search to Knowledge RAG server
tasks.description: Add knowledge_search and knowledge_clear MCP tools. Implement FTS5 BM25 search as baseline. Add optional sqlite-vss vector search when available. Add sentence-transformers embedding support.
acceptance: knowledge_search MCP tool returns top-k relevant chunks for a query
FTS5 BM25 ranking works as baseline search (no extra deps required)
sqlite-vss vector search works when sqlite-vss is installed
knowledge_clear MCP tool deletes all data for a project
Search results include: file_path, chunk content, relevance score

tasks.title: Create /knowledge-ingest and /knowledge-search commands
tasks.description: Build slash commands that wrap the Knowledge RAG MCP tools. /knowledge-ingest triggers ingestion of current project. /knowledge-search queries the knowledge base.
acceptance: commands/knowledge-ingest.md triggers knowledge_ingest for current project directory
commands/knowledge-search.md queries knowledge base and displays results
Both commands handle the case where knowledge-rag-server is not configured

tasks.title: Create community contribution schema and validation
tasks.description: Create schemas/community-package.schema.json for community contributions. Build commands/community-validate.md that validates agent/skill contributions locally. Create scripts/validate-contribution.sh for CI.
acceptance: schemas/community-package.schema.json defines package manifest format
commands/community-validate.md validates contributions against schema
scripts/validate-contribution.sh runs validation checks (frontmatter, naming, duplicates)
Validation checks: required fields, kebab-case naming, no duplicate identifiers

tasks.title: Update install.sh and register Knowledge RAG MCP server
tasks.description: Update install.sh to create ~/.claude/mcp-registry/ and ~/.claude/knowledge/ directories. Add knowledge-rag-server.py to MCP server configuration. Update config/settings.json template.
acceptance: install.sh creates ~/.claude/mcp-registry/ directory
install.sh creates ~/.claude/knowledge/ directory
knowledge-rag-server registered in config/settings.json template
Optional dependencies documented (sentence-transformers, sqlite-vss)

tasks.title: Integration testing and documentation
tasks.description: Update AGENTS.md with new patterns. Update README.md marketplace section. Add all new commands to Telegram dispatch routing. Run integration smoke tests for all new commands.
acceptance: AGENTS.md updated with marketplace patterns and gotchas
README.md has marketplace features section
All new commands accessible via Telegram dispatch
Smoke test: /mcp-search returns results
Smoke test: /knowledge-ingest completes without error
